decision: Should investors view Biogen’s completed acquisition of Apellis (May 14, 2026) as structurally investable now, given C3-targeted mechanism, AMD genetics, OAKS/DERBY efficacy, and postmarketing safety signals with Syfovre?
summary: Acquisition has moderate structural eligibility: strong complement C3 mechanism and AMD genetics; measurable GA efficacy; operational friction from rare post‑marketing retinal vasculitis; CVR upside depends on pharmacovigilance and prescriber adoption.

conditions: Enhance PV and track vasculitis reporting rates
Codify prescriber education and risk communication
Scenario-plan CVR milestones under safety headwinds
